subcodes.first_line: O Kazim! 'Ali-Akbar hath arrived and his letter hath reached Us. He hath repaired to the Guest House, and this hath attained unto the honor of being heard in Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا کاظم علی اکبر رسید و نامه رسید او بمسافرخانه راجع و این تلقاء وجه بشرف اصغا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @unity; oneness of humanity, @outward and inward meanings, @religion as source of love and unity
